message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Patient Demographics Consumer" as PC
participant "Patient Demographics Supplier" as PS
participant "Patient Demographics Consumer" as PC2
participant "PDQm Implementation grouped as a façade" as PDI

PC ->> PS: Mobile Patient Demographics Query [ITI-78]
PS ->> PDI: Internal processing
PDI ->> PC2: Patient Demographics Query [ITI-21] or Patient Demographics Query for HL7v3 [ITI-47]
PC2 ->> PS: [ITI-21] or [ITI-47] Response
PS ->> PDI: Internal processing
PDI ->> PC: [ITI-78] Response

@enduml
